name: Louise Frazier's Southern Corn Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Combine the dry ingredients in a large bowl.
3. Stir in the wet ingredients and mix until just combined.
4. Grease an 8-inch square pan with butter or a non-stick spray.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
6. Bake for 40 minutes, checking at the 30-minute mark.
7. This recipe yields 6 to 8 servings.
8. For substitutions, use skim buttermilk, Egg Beaters, and butter substitutes for the dripping.
9. To test for doneness, insert a toothpick into the center of the bread; it should come out clean.
